data.title: Brazil's top private bank suggests investing 3% in Bitcoin by 2026 for diversifying portfolios amid volatility.
data.description: The largest private bank in Brazil has indicated that Bitcoin could enhance portfolio diversification and serve as a hedge against currency risk, despite experiencing a year of volatility.

data.title: IOTA launches new app for passive income with BTC, XRP, and USDT. Users can participate in cloud computing power for free using mainstream cryptocurrencies like BTC, DOGE, and ETH. The app supports over ten crypto assets and allows users to manage contracts and settings on-the-go. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: IOTA recently launched a mobile app on Dec. 12, 2025, allowing users to participate in cloud computing power using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Ethereum. The UK-based platform enables users to engage in computing power without any hardware or technical knowledge. Users can monitor progress, manage contracts, and adjust settings on the go, with the app running in the background during daily activities. The aim is to democratize cryptocurrency cloud computing for ordinary users. The app supports over ten mainstream crypto assets for deposits and settlements. Key highlights include a user-friendly interface and accessibility, making it easier than traditional trading platforms. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Official streaming platform for Games of the Future Abu Dhabi 2025 by ADNOC launched before opening; MOBA PC.Dota 2 competition kicks off.
data.description: Exciting news for fans worldwide as the MOBA PC game Dota 2 competition commences in Abu Dhabi, UAE on December 13, 2025. Phygital International, a pioneer in phygital sports, has unveiled the GOTF OTT Platform for an enhanced viewing experience. This marks a significant step in the realm of digital sports, offering a unique blend of physical and digital elements for spectators. Global audiences can look forward to unmatched entertainment with this new platform.

data.title: Critics attack Citadel's push for stricter DeFi rules on tokenized stocks; DeFi Education Fund fights back.
data.description: The DeFi Education Fund has taken a stand against Citadel Securities’ proposal for the SEC to subject DeFi platforms to securities laws when trading tokenized stocks.

data.title: Robex files addendum to circular for amendment to agreement with Predictive Discovery.
data.description: Robex has issued an addendum to the information circular regarding their amendment to the arrangement agreement with Predictive Discovery. This update includes important changes to the agreement that shareholders should be aware of. The revised terms outline new conditions and modifications to be considered. The addendum aims to provide clarity and transparency to investors regarding the amended agreement. Shareholders are advised to review the updated information carefully to understand the impact on the previously agreed-upon terms. This development comes as a significant adjustment in the collaboration between Robex and Predictive Discovery.

data.title: SmallRig & FamilyLens launch global family filmmaking initiative at 3rd FamilyLens Int'l Film Festival in Beijing on Dec 6.
data.description: A recent initiative has been launched to focus on improving the challenges faced in family filmmaking. The 3rd FamilyLens International Film Festival commenced in Beijing on December 6th. SmallRig, a prominent global supplier of imaging solutions, has partnered with FamilyLens for this event.

data.title: Rokid sets crowdfunding record in Taiwan with NT$62 million in pre-order funding for Rokid Glasses launch.
data.description: On December 13, 2025, in Taipei, Rokid, a leading company in human-computer interaction and augmented reality, reached a significant achievement on Taiwan's creative crowdfunding platform, zeczec. Their campaign for Rokid Glasses exceeded NT$62 million in pre-order funding, showcasing strong support from backers. The milestone highlights the popularity and success of Rokid in the technology sector and their ability to engage consumers effectively in innovative products.

data.title: Jay Walker signs TV deal for "Jay Walker: PRIMETIME", launching in Jacksonville on Jan 3 and nationwide on REVIVE on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: A new television series hosted by media entrepreneur Jay Walker is set to premiere on WFOX in Jacksonville on January 3, 2026. Following this, the show will have a daily nationwide launch on REVIVE starting February 17, 2026. This announcement was made in Nashville, Tennessee on December 12, 2025. Walker's show, titled "Jay Walker:...", is part of a significant deal and is anticipated to attract a wide audience across the country.

data.title: HiTHIUM's Eco-Day unveils 3 innovations in long-duration energy storage, revolutionizing the green power sector.
data.description: In Xiamen, China, on December 12, 2025, the third HiTHIUM Eco-Day event took place, focusing on the significance of Long-duration Energy Storage (LDES) in addressing renewable energy intermittency challenges and facilitating continuous green power supply. The theme for this successful gathering was "The Awakening of Energy • The New World," emphasizing the crucial role of LDES.
Cornish Metals has successfully obtained the final order for its plan of arrangement.

data.title: Prospera Energy Inc. secures financing update on Dec. 12, 2025 (TSX.V: PEI, OTC: GXRFF) from Calgary, Alberta.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on December 12, 2025, Prospera Energy Inc. (TSX.V: PEI, OTC: GXRFF) known as Prospera, PEI, or the Corporation.

data.title: Scully Royalty Ltd. reveals update on annual general meeting on Dec. 27, 2025, after MILFAM LLC files as dissident.
data.description: Scully Royalty Ltd. (NYSE: SRL) issued an update regarding its upcoming annual general meeting slated for December 27, 2025. The meeting faces a challenge as MILFAM LLC submitted a dissident filing. The company’s shareholders will convene to address this development and deliberate on key matters.

data.title: Shrub Oak School names Nancy Tritsch as new Director of Education, specializing in autistic individuals.
data.description: In Mohegan Lake, New York, on December 12, 2025, Shrub Oak International School, an esteemed therapeutic program catering to autistic individuals, has appointed Nancy Tritsch, MS Ed, EdM, as their new Director of Education. This school serves autistic children, adolescents, and young adults through both day and residential programs, and aims to provide specialized care and education for this population.
ADP is getting more attention than usual. Not because it is ideal, but because key labor data will miss the December FOMC window. In a data vacuum, even second-best indicators can move expectations.

data.title: FDA approves AKEEGA® precision therapy for BRCA2-mutated mCSPC with 54% reduction in disease progression.
data.description: A milestone has been achieved in the field of precision medicine with the recent FDA approval of a new indication for AKEEGA®. This dual-action tablet, combining niraparib and abiraterone acetate along with prednisone, has been given the green light for treating patients with BRCA2-mutated metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer (mCSPC). This marks the first FDA-approved combination treatment tailored to this specific genetic mutation. The announcement came from Horsham, Pennsylvania, on December 12, 2025. Johnson & Johnson, listed on NYSE as JNJ, is behind this groundbreaking development. This news signifies a significant advancement in personalized medical treatments, providing hope and targeted care for individuals with this particular genetic profile.

data.title: Consumer watchdog CUB of Illinois unveils biggest threats to utility bills for 2026, aiming to combat high costs.
data.description: Chicago, on December 12, 2025, the consumer advocacy group Citizens Utility Board (CUB) of Illinois released a report highlighting potential risks to utility affordability in 2026. Drawing on insights gained from addressing soaring utility expenses, CUB identified key challenges facing consumers.

data.title: Revere Tactical Opportunities REIT, LLC and Fund IV, LP auctioning 100% class B limited partner interest in Casoro Aviator Investors, LP via public sale.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Dallas, a secured party public sale will be conducted by Revere Tactical Opportunities REIT, LLC and Revere Tactical Opportunities Fund IV, LP, in accordance with Section 9-610 of the Uniform Commercial Code. Interested buyers can participate to bid on the assets, with the highest bidder winning the sale.

data.title: Tether offers $1B bid to acquire Juventus FC, aiming to purchase controlling stake and remaining shares, which Exor rejects.
data.description: Tether has expressed its intention to acquire a majority stake in Juventus, along with the remaining shares, in an attempt to take control of the football club. The offer made by Tether to purchase Exor's stake has been rejected by Exor.

data.title: Fobi AI announces partial revocation order and non-brokered private placement, excluding distribution in the US.
data.description: This news information is not intended to be shared with U.S. news wire services or disseminated within the United States. Please refrain from distributing this to such channels within the country. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

data.title: In 2025, Ohio State's Caleb Downs wins the Paycom Jim Thorpe Award for top college football defensive back. Presented on ESPN.
data.description: Caleb Downs from Ohio State University has been awarded the 2025 Paycom Jim Thorpe Award, recognizing him as the top defensive back in college football. The announcement was made during The Home Depot College Football Awards on ESPN, where Downs was honored for his outstanding performance, athletic ability, and character. Downs leads the No. 1 defense in the country, and received the award on behalf of the Oklahoma Sports Hall of Fame, Jim Thorpe Association, and presenting entity.
